infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Petron San Pedro App to access your camera to take profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Petron San Pedro App to access your photos to set your profile picture.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Petron San Pedro App to use your location to accurately pinpoint your delivery address.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Petron San Pedro App to access your photos to set your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Petron San Pedro App to access your camera to take profile pictures.
